creator: freebsd@dreamchaser.org
text:
http://www.dreamchaser.org/garya/misc/Bug_226544.orf

The following change to graphics/lensfun/mil-olympus.xml does not fix the problem, but makes it go away for this particular camera if that's a help:

*** mil-olympus.xml_org Sun Nov 15 10:07:26 2015
--- mil-olympus.xml     Mon Mar 12 08:29:34 2018
***************
*** 121,126 ****
--- 121,134 ----
      </camera>
  
      <camera>
+         <maker>OLYMPUS CORPORATION</maker>
+         <maker lang="en">Olympus</maker>
+         <model>E-M1MarkII</model>
+         <mount>Micro 4/3 System</mount>
+         <cropfactor>2.0</cropfactor>
+     </camera>
+ 
+     <camera>
          <maker>Olympus Imaging Corp.</maker>
          <maker lang="en">Olympus</maker>
          <model>E-M5</model>
